name: SIM Acquisition Corp. I
business: SIM Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a business combination. It has not selected any business combination target and currently has no operations or revenues. The company intends to focus on targets headquartered or primarily operating in the United States that play a role in revitalizing domestic manufacturing and strengthening critical supply chains.

exposures.sentence: The core focus will be on companies headquartered or primarily operating in the United States that play a meaningful role in revitalizing domestic manufacturing, expanding innovation ecosystems, and strengthening critical supply chains.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by July 11, 2026, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering.
